sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46205" key="zh=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῆ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῆθι</orth>, imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῶ</foreign> (q.v.). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζηβήνη</orth>, <sense id="n46205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ζιβύνη</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
